subject: Bramblin, a tumbleweed-like Pokemon with hollow dark eye sockets and trailing branch-like appendages, drifting through a nighttime wilderness
description: A round, tumbleweed-like Pokemon floats or rolls through an open wilderness at night. Its body is a tangled mass of brown bramble with two hollow dark eye sockets and multiple trailing vine or branch appendages reaching outward. A large full moon glows warmly in the background behind the creature, casting a golden-orange hue across the scene. The setting feels dry, desolate, and slightly eerie, evoking a ghost-like wanderer adrift in the dark.
foreground: Bramblin, tangled bramble sphere with hollow eye sockets and trailing branches
background: Full moon glowing warm orange-gold, dark night sky, dry open terrain
